/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_async_queue.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_async_queue.dir/test_async_queue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_async_queue.dir/test_async_queue_threadsafety.cpp.o -o test_async_queue  ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/async/libasync.a ../../lib/port/libport.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../lib/logger/liblogger.a ../../lib/port/libport.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread ../../lib/libgtest.a
